summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SGP v2.0 new features. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend Build Panel verified working with tech stack selection, feature toggles, and project generation. All new endpoints (prompt optimization, enhanced build, ZIP download, marketing generation) are functional.

minor.issue: LLM-powered optimization can timeout on slow responses (>90s)
minor.note: Quick mode (use_llm=false) works instantly as fallback

integration_issues.issue: Build Panel shows 'No specification available' warning even after Socratic analysis completes. The session/specification props may not be passed correctly from parent component.
integration_issues.note: Build still works with default specification - generates valid code

context_for_next_testing_agent: SGP v2.0 new features fully tested. POST /api/prompt/optimize works in quick mode (instant) and LLM mode (may timeout). POST /api/build/enhanced creates 20+ files with CRUD, Auth, Tests. GET /api/build/download/{id} returns valid ZIP. POST /api/marketing/generate creates landing pages, emails, social posts. Frontend Build Panel at bottom-24 works but may show 'No specification' warning if session not passed.

POST /api/prompt/optimize.returns: optimized prompt, enhancements, entities, actions, tech_stack, complexity_score

GET /api/build/preview/{id}.returns: file list with path, language, size, preview

GET /api/build/download/{id}.returns: Valid ZIP file with all artifacts
